asset.title: Ic Room
asset.purpose: README live walkthrough clip. Judge whether the feature is obvious, visually consistent, and credible as evidence.

judge.summary: The walkthrough clearly demonstrates importing a CRM row into a research table with real-time room trace updates. It is highly relevant for finance and GTM workflows.

featureClarity.evidence: Demonstrates pasting a comma-separated row to import an account into the research table.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Shows the complete flow from clicking import, pasting data, submitting, and seeing the table and trace update.

visualDesign.evidence: Clean dark-themed UI with clear focus states, though the interface is quite dense.

consistency.evidence: Aligns with the NodeRoom concept of collaborative research tables and audit trails.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Captured directly from a live browser session showing real UI interactions.

legibility.evidence: Text in the input field and table cells is readable, though some room trace text is small.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Directly applicable to investment and GTM teams managing pipeline accounts.

productionHonesty.evidence: Accurately depicts manual input parsing and immediate trace logging without artificial speedups.

defects.observed: The text pasted into the import box is slightly cut off at the bottom due to line-height constraints.
defects.fix: Adjust the padding or line-height of the import textarea to prevent vertical clipping.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Importing new advisor opportunities directly into your shared research table with automatic provenance tracking.
